texto: When I had my first voice lesson I was 15 years old. And I had a really good teacher. This is what made all the difference. A good teacher will teach you the technique, but also how to listen to your voice.

frase_original: When I had my first voice lesson I was 15 years old. And I had a really good teacher. This is what made all the difference. A good teacher will teach you the technique, but also how to listen to your voice.

texto: I still love to walk in the mountains or be on the sea. I like to be in nature. Sometimes I bicycle. It's important to feel good with your body. The body is extremely important. If you feel good, you have more energy in your singing.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cecilia Bartoli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I still love to walk in the mountains or be on the sea. I like to be in nature. Sometimes I bicyc…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, love, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de good e sea.
